sentences.english: My dream is to become a doctor.
I want to help sick people feel better.
I study hard every day to get into a good university.
sentences.korean: 좋은 대학에 가려고 매일 열심히 공부해요.

sentences.english: Science and math are the most important subjects for me.
sentences.korean: 과학과 수학이 나에게 가장 중요한 과목이에요.

sentences.english: I know it will be hard but I will never give up.
sentences.korean: 어려울 거란 건 알지만 절대 포기하지 않을 거예요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
